revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ikino Shrine
| native_name = 伊伎神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ikino Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ikino Shrine'''|伊伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11636413|ltq=Q11636413|qid=Q11636413|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province}}
** Series ordinal: 104
** P155: {{ill|Q135040246|ltq=Q135040246|qid=Q135040246|1=Ukusono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Hosorokino Shrine|lt=Hosorokino Shrine|qid=Q135040248|1=Hosorokino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1047144|ltq=Q1047144|qid=Q1047144|1=Echizen Province}}
* {{ill|Q7402764|ltq=Q7402764|qid=Q7402764|1=Sakai District, Fukui}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182291
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
